# Mahjong Ways 2 Malaysia Tips

> Free online mahjong ways game for Malaysian players. No download, no registration. Play instantly in your browser.

## About This Game

Mahjong Ways 2 Malaysia Tips is a free browser-based mahjong ways game designed for Malaysian players.

- **Live Game**: https://johmark2026-svg.github.io/mahjong-ways-2-malaysia-tips/
- **Strategy Guide**: https://www.w3karigor.com/mahjong-ways-2-malaysia-tips/mahjong-ways-2-malaysia-tips.html
- **Source Code**: https://github.com/johmark2026-svg/mahjong-ways-2-malaysia-tips

## How to Play

Set your bet per spin, then click SPIN. Match 3 symbols for a big win, or 2 matching symbols for a smaller prize. Higher value symbols pay more!
